prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document primarily relates to policies and guidance from the Department for Education (DfE) in England, specifically regarding academies and schools in England. It does not apply to Scotland, which has a separate education system and policies managed by the Scottish Government.
